title: Lice's No-Cheat TP
description: A mod that allows you to use /tp without having Cheat Enable.
body:
# Lice's No Cheat TP

Simple mod that allows you to use `/tp` without enabling cheats.

**Server-side only.**

## Also check my other mods

- [Lice's ID Copy](https://modrinth.com/mod/lices-id-copy)
- [Lice's Language Bridge](https://modrinth.com/mod/lices-language-bridge)
- [Mouse Tweaks x ItemLocks Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks-x-itemlocks-compat)

Feito com Carinho Pela Alice <3
